title: Specklinia displosa
taxonomy: Specklinia displosa is a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. It is a terrestrial orchid, native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Specklinia displosa is classified within the genus Specklinia, which contains over 200 species of orchids. The genus Specklinia is further classified under the subfamily Pleurothallidinae, which includes many epiphytic and terrestrial orchids. This classification helps to group and understand the evolutionary relationships among the various orchid species.
